notableEvents.label: Mickey Moniak GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Jeremy Peña. Edouard Julien out at 2nd. Mickey Moniak out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brenton Doyle reaches on a fielder's choice. Willi Castro to 2nd. Willi Castro advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Jeremy Peña.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Moniak singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith. Mickey Moniak to 2nd. Mickey Moniak advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by right fielder Cam Smith.
